Findings

[BLOCK] Hardcoded API key in source

An API key was found embedded in a JS bundle.

CWE: CWE-798

[FLAG] CSP allows unsafe-inline

Content-Security-Policy permits inline scripts.

CWE: CWE-693

[PASS] Analytics SDK present

Standard analytics SDK detected; no exfiltration observed.

auth-login

curl -X POST https://api.example.com/login
